channel.title: Software Engineering on Johan Basson
channel.description: Recent content in Software Engineering on Johan Basson

item.title: Every Abstraction Has a Cost
item.description: Abstractions make software easier to change, but they also make it harder to understand. The challenge is knowing when they’re worth the cost.

item.title: Code Should Read Like Documentation
item.description: One of the principles that has shaped how I write software over the years is that code should explain itself.
